content:
# 顶部导航栏

## 使用场景

应用顶部的全局导航组件，用于品牌展示、页面导航和用户操作入口。适用于管理系统、官网、SaaS 产品等几乎所有 Web 应用。

## 布局结构

水平布局，固定高度 56px：左侧为 Logo + 产品名，中间为导航菜单项（水平排列），右侧为用户头像和操作按钮。整体宽度撑满容器。

## 节点树示例

```json
{
  "type": "group",
  "id": "top-navbar-root",
  "name": "顶部导航栏",
  "transform": {
    "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
    "size": { "width": 1200, "height": 56 },
    "rotation": 0,
    "opacity": 1
  },
  "zIndex": 0,
  "locked": false,
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "navbar-bg",
      "name": "导航栏背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
        "size": { "width": 1200, "height": 56 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 0,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
      "stroke": { "color": "#f0f0f0", "width": 1, "style": "solid" },
      "cornerRadius": 0
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "id": "navbar-logo",
      "name": "品牌Logo",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 24, "y": 12 },
        "size": { "width": 32, "height": 32 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "src": "https://example.com/logo.png",
      "objectFit": "contain"
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "navbar-brand",
      "name": "产品名称",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 64, "y": 16 },
        "size": { "width": 120, "height": 24 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "产品名称",
      "style": { "fontSize": 16, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#262626", "align": "left", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "navbar-menu-1",
      "name": "菜单项-首页",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 300, "y": 18 },
        "size": { "width": 60, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "首页",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#1677FF", "align": "center", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "navbar-menu-2",
      "name": "菜单项-产品",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 380, "y": 18 },
        "size": { "width": 60, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "产品",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "center", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "navbar-menu-3",
      "name": "菜单项-关于",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 460, "y": 18 },
        "size": { "width": 60, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "关于",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "normal", "color": "#262626", "align": "center", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "navbar-avatar-bg",
      "name": "用户头像背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 1136, "y": 12 },
        "size": { "width": 32, "height": 32 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#1677FF" },
      "cornerRadius": 16
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "navbar-avatar-text",
      "name": "用户头像文字",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 1136, "y": 18 },
        "size": { "width": 32, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 2,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "U",
      "style": { "fontSize": 14, "fontWeight": "bold", "color": "#ffffff", "align": "center", "lineHeight": 1.5 }
    }
  ]
}
```

## 设计要点

- 导航栏高度固定 56px，白色背景，底部 1px 边线分隔
- Logo 尺寸 32×32px，紧跟产品名称，左侧内边距 24px
- 菜单项间距 80px，当前激活项使用主色 #1677FF
- 用户头像在右侧，使用圆形（cornerRadius = 高度/2），主色背景 + 白色首字母
- 整体三段式布局：左侧品牌区 | 中间导航区 | 右侧用户区

metadata.description: 顶部导航栏：Logo + 菜单项 + 用户头像/操作区
